_comment: Licensed Apache-2.0 OR MIT (see REUSE.toml aggregate) — Claude Desktop config snippet for noyalib-mcp
_usage: Drop the contents of mcpServers below into your existing claude_desktop_config.json. If the file doesn't exist yet, create it with this exact shape. Restart Claude Desktop after saving.
_capabilities_advertised: tools/call (noyalib_get) — read a value at a YAML path
tools/call (noyalib_set) — set a value at a YAML path with comment-preserving lossless edit
_smoke_test: After Claude Desktop restarts, ask: 'Read port from /tmp/test.yaml' — Claude should call noyalib_get with file=/tmp/test.yaml, path=port, and return the value.
